arts.ttl: Nico Williams TORN over Arsenal summer transfer
arts.sum: Nico Williams is torn over whether to join Arsenal or stay at Athletic Bilbao this summer. Arsenal and Barcelona were in a two-way tussle to sign Williams last summer but the player eventually stayed at Athletic Bilbao.

Athletic Club's chances of qualifying for Champions League football are now looking strong, sitting five points above fifth-placed Villarreal. Although they suffered a 1-0 defeat to Real Madrid last t...

arts.ttl: Athletic Bilbao injury latest for Man United Europa League clash after Nico Williams update
arts.sum: Latest injury news from the opposition camp as Manchester United soon face Athletic Club in the Europa League semi-finals

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe Reacts to Fede Valverde's Golazo vs. Athletic Bilbao
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé could not contain his excitement as he watched Fede Valverde score a stoppage-time winner against Athletic Bilbao.

arts.ttl: Athletic Club star hails Real Madrid player for moment of ‘genius’ during La Liga clash
arts.sum: Athletic Club star Unai Nuñez has moved to reveal his appreciation for the efforts of Real Madrid midfielder Federico Valverde. This of course comes after the Uruguayan international proved himself…
